title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 174.261 - State to fund universities
text:
174.261.  State to fund universities. — The state of Missouri may provide the funds necessary to provide the staff, cost of operation, and payment of all capital improvements commenced after July 1, 1977, for Missouri Southern State University and Missouri Western State University.
(L. 1975 S.B. 114 § 4, A.L. 1995 H.B. 442, A.L. 2005 S.B. 98)
